[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100101 3
1 10011101 5
2 01011010 4
3 00100010 2
4 00111101 5
5 10010100 3
6 01101111 6
7 01010000 2

01 10 11101111 7
12 21 10111101 6
23 32 11111111 a
34 43 01111111 7
45 54 01011010 4 match 2
56 65 11001111 6
67 76 11011101 6
70 07 11111111 a

02 20 11111111 a
13 31 01101111 6 match 6
24 42 11010100 4
35 53 01101111 6 match 6
46 64 11011101 6
57 75 01011010 4 match 2
60 06 11101111 7
71 17 00111101 5 match 4

03 30 11101111 7
14 41 01111101 6
25 52 11011110 6
36 63 11101111 7
47 74 01010000 2 match 7
50 05 11101111 7
61 16 11101101 6
72 27 10010100 3 match 5

04 40 11111111 a
15 51 01101111 6 match 6
26 62 11011101 6
37 73 01111111 7
